# Motivation V1.2 KuaiSearch environment manifest

Purpose: reproduce the current KuaiSearch Motivation V1.2 data preparation,
Q0--Q3 Qwen rankers, W0 witness, and shared evaluation commands.

This is a compact dependency contract rather than a raw `pip freeze`; it
excludes machine-local editable packages and build paths.

Environment:

```bash
conda create -n pps-kuaisearch python=3.10 -y
conda activate pps-kuaisearch
pip install torch numpy transformers datasets accelerate peft sentence-transformers \
  faiss-cpu scikit-learn scipy pandas einops sentencepiece wandb pyyaml
```

Observed versions on 2026-07-09:

```text
python==3.10.20
torch==2.6.0+cu124
numpy==1.24.3
transformers==5.12.1
datasets==5.0.0
accelerate==1.14.0
peft==0.19.1
sentence-transformers==5.6.0
faiss-cpu==1.7.4
scikit-learn==1.7.2
scipy==1.13.1
pandas==2.0.3
einops==0.8.2
sentencepiece==0.2.1
wandb==0.28.0
pyyaml==6.0.2
```

Sanity commands:

```bash
python scripts/validate_standardized_records.py --help
python scripts/train_motivation_v12_ranker.py --help
python scripts/evaluate_motivation_v12_evidence.py --help
```
